name: Wet 'n' Wild Hawaii
tagline: 26 rides including Keiki Kove splash zone — the full water park experience on the island.
parking: Free parking at 400 Farrington Hwy, Kapolei
bestTime: Weekdays for shorter lines; arrive at opening for the first hour with no waits
kamaaina: Kamaaina annual passes and discounted day rates with valid Hawaii ID
talkStory: ~$50/adult, ~$38/kids — book online for 10% off. Keiki Kove is perfect for toddlers while older kids hit the big slides. Bring your own towels and sunscreen (rentals and shop are overpriced). Lockers available but bring a waterproof pouch for your phone. Food is pricey inside — eat a big breakfast before. Allow a full day, especially with kids.
